spec: AN11(b) deterministic verifier — LoRA delta eigenvectors vs consciousness templates cosine
substrate: linear algebra only (no LLM, no embedding)

gate.rule: PASS iff max(cosine_matrix) > max_cosine_min AND sum(top3_cosines) > top3_cosine_sum_min

primary_schema.eigenvalues: array[eigen_top_k] of float (optional, used for weighted rank)

fallback_schema.phi_vec: array[16] of float — treated as top-1 eigenvector

comment.max_cosine_min: 0.5 — random 16D unit vectors expected cosine ~0.25; 0.5 is 2x random baseline
comment.top3_cosine_sum_min: 1.2 — require 3 strong attachments not single coincidence
comment.no_llm: template 은 static text + pre-computed 16D signature (tokenizer hash bucket, not embedding)
comment.v8_safe_commit: additive module — does NOT modify pass_gate_an11.hexa
